channel.title: ZooZoo Restaurant
channel.description: ZooZoo restaurant has the best dinner experience in town

item.title: Home
item.dc:creator: presspilot
item.content:encoded:
Built with PressPilot Golden Foundation

ZooZoo Restaurant

ZooZoo restaurant has the best dinner experience in town

Reserve a table
View full menu

Made for dining experiences

🍕 Menu storytelling

Highlight signature dishes, chef notes, and seasonal specials.

☎️ Reservation ready

Clear CTAs for booking, phone orders, and walk-ins.

🛵 Delivery & pickup

Promote delivery partners, takeout links, and order hours.

📍 Location friendly

Map, hours, and neighborhood callouts keep guests oriented.

Plans for every restaurant_cafe

ZooZoo Restaurant can switch tiers any time—kits stay in sync automatically.

Starter

$19 / month

  • 1 brand setup
  • Basic analytics
  • Email support
Choose Starter

Growth

$49 / month

  • Unlimited kits
  • Mode-aware add-ons
  • Priority support
Choose Growth

Pro

$99 / month

  • Dedicated strategist
  • Custom exports
  • Training & SLA
Choose Pro

Latest updates

Use this space to share product launches, playbooks, or insights.

Playbook

ZooZoo Restaurant release notes

Share a concise summary of your latest platform update or feature drop.

Case study

How teams ship faster

Highlight a customer win, metric, or testimonial from recent work.

Announcement

What’s next for ZooZoo Restaurant

Tease upcoming launches, events, or community projects to keep people excited.

Ready to work with ZooZoo Restaurant?

Tell us your party size or catering needs and we’ll confirm quickly. Reach us at hello@zoozoo-restaurant.com.

  • Email: hello@zoozoo-restaurant.com

Call now
